issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO' (Character removed from field), not 'Activated'. The effect activates automatically when a character is removed, not as a player-activated ability.
Condition is missing. Must include 'HasCardOnBoard' or similar to check '5 or less cards in hand' (hand size check). Current condition 'Always' ignores the hand requirement.
Duration missing. Text contains '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn.
